# INFINI Agent | The Best Open Source Easysearch/Elasticsearch/OpenSearch Multi-instance Management Agent

> AI-friendly index of site content.

## Core Content
- [Installing the Agent](https://docs.infinilabs.com/agent/v1.30.3/docs/getting-started/install/): Installing the Agent #  INFINI Agent supports mainstream operating systems and platforms. The program package is small, with no extra external dependency. So, the agent can be installed very rapidly …
- [es_cluster_health](https://docs.infinilabs.com/agent/v1.30.3/docs/configuration/processors/es_cluster_health/): es_cluster_health #  Description #  Collect the cluster health metrics.
Configuration Example #  pipeline - name: collect_default_es_cluster_health auto_start: true keep_running: true …
- [es_cluster_stats](https://docs.infinilabs.com/agent/v1.30.3/docs/configuration/processors/es_cluster_stats/): es_cluster_stats #  Description #  Collect the cluster stats metrics.
Configuration Example #  pipeline - name: collect_default_es_cluster_stats auto_start: true keep_running: true retry_delay_in_ms: …
- [es_index_stats](https://docs.infinilabs.com/agent/v1.30.3/docs/configuration/processors/es_index_stats/): es_index_stats #  Description #  Collect the cluster index stats metrics.
Configuration Example #  pipeline - name: collect_default_es_index_stats auto_start: true keep_running: true …
- [es_logs_processor](https://docs.infinilabs.com/agent/v1.30.3/docs/configuration/processors/es_logs_processor/): es_logs_processor #  Description #  Collect the cluster log files.
Configuration Example #  pipeline - name: collect_default_es_logs auto_start: true keep_running: true retry_delay_in_ms: 3000 …
- [es_node_stats](https://docs.infinilabs.com/agent/v1.30.3/docs/configuration/processors/es_node_stats/): es_node_stats #  Description #  Collect the cluster node stats metrics.
Configuration Example #  pipeline - name: collect_default_es_node_stats auto_start: true keep_running: true retry_delay_in_ms: …
- [logs_processor](https://docs.infinilabs.com/agent/v1.30.3/docs/configuration/processors/logs_processor/): logs_processor #  Description #  Collect the local log files.
Configuration Example #  The elasticsearch log files as an example.
pipeline: - name: log_collect auto_start: true keep_running: true …
